metadata.description: The Context Architecture skill: audit and structure a codebase (greenfield or brownfield) so it is legible to people and AI agents.

plugins.name: context-architecture
plugins.description: Audit and structure a codebase so it is legible to people and AI agents. Applies the nine principles of Context Architecture: make structure say what the system does, place AGENTS.md at boundaries, codify conventions in lint and types, find unbound claims, and back every claim the repo makes about itself with a check that fails when it stops being true. Works greenfield (a repo born legible) and brownfield (a repo restructured in steps).
